AS
(SELECT {0}, 
ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY {1} ORDER BY OverwriteTime) as OrderId, SolutionId

AND {1} IN 
(SELECT {1} FROM {2} WHERE  SolutionId IN (@fall12OptInSolutionId, @leoOptinSolutionId)) )

IF OBJECT_ID('[SystemApplicationMetadataBase]','U') is not null
BEGIN 
	update [SystemApplicationMetadataBase] 
	set [State]=2, [ModifiedOn]=GETUTCDATE()
	where ([SystemApplicationMetadataId] = 'B7AD7D6F-AB4C-4261-AB8F-F8D61B3C1AB3')

	update [SystemApplicationMetadataBase]
	set [FormFactor]=1
	where [FormFactor] is null
END

IF OBJECT_ID('[UserApplicationMetadataBase]','U') is not null
BEGIN 
	update [UserApplicationMetadataBase]
	set [FormFactor]=1
	where [FormFactor] is null

m.Name as SdkMessageName,
p.TypeName,

join PluginAssemblyBase pa with (NOLOCK) on (pa.PluginAssemblyId = p.PluginAssemblyId)
left join SdkMessageFilterBase f with (NOLOCK) on (f.SdkMessageFilterId = step.SdkMessageFilterId)
left join Enti
